master_row.title: Breathing Mode Frequency Relation
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Magnetoacoustic Breathing Mode] The field undergoes resonant breathing with characteristic frequency: \begin{equation} \omega_{\text{breathing}}^2 = \omega_0^2 + \omega_{\text{Alfvén}}^2 - i\gamma\omega_{\text{breathing}} \end{equation} where $\omega_{\text{Alfvén}} = k v_A = k B/\sqrt{\mu_0\rho}$ couples magnetic and acoustic modes. \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Resonant Field Breathing Dynamics’.
master_row.dictionary: Breathing Mode Frequency Relation — ω_breathing^2 = ω_0^2 + ω_Alfvén^2 - iγω_breathing
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00AllEdit\analysis_all_edit_focus_11_22\output\all_edit_equation_arc_compact.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
